creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2008-08-31 13:09:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  QtCurve is a set of widget styles for Qt4/KDE4, KDE3 and Gtk2 based apps.
  This port provides KDE3 theme engine.
  
  PR:             126941
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Klimov <lazyklimm at gmail.com>
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3/pkg-plist (new)
